feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Half life 4 confirmed
entry.content: Half life 4 confirmed
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /b/ Random: A girl who calls herself racist thought I was the absolute worst person in the c…
entry.content: A girl who calls herself racist thought I was the absolute worst person in the class even though the class was full of "Kanaks" and brown people and I was practically the only German there, lmao. And she passes herself off as a German nationalist or a Slav, but she’s actually mixed-race, lmao hahahahaha. Should we rape her?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /hpcg/ - High Performance Computing General
entry.content: "It scales on my laptop" edition previous: >>? READ THE MANUAL. PROFILE BEFORE POSTING. /hpcg/ is for discussing clusters, supercomputers, schedulers, accelerators, networking, parallel programming, numerical methods, and finding increasingly elaborate ways to avoid reading Intel's optimization manual. >What should I learn? Linux. Then Bash. Then C/C++. Then MPI. Then OpenMP. Then CUDA/HIP/SYCL. Then profiling. Then vectorization. Then NUMA. Then realize your code spends 93% of its runtime waiti
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Any Juke owners here?
entry.content: I love my Nissan Juke but I am a little worried about the cvt transmission. I bought fluid to flush and change it recently but I haven’t done it yet. I’m somewhere just over 130k miles. She’s been good to me for the past 2 years. I got her at 116k miles. 2012 sv awd. Share your juke experiences, stories, and opinions.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Birdwatching
entry.content: In your 30's? Looking for a dope activity that's outside? Birdwatching is it my man, it gives purpose to walks, gives you something to learn about your local area, and lets you meet likeminded people who love birds. Birds are very important and if you are looking for something new to do, birdwatching might just be for you!
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Name a bigger technological fall from grace
entry.content: Name a bigger technological fall from grace
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I found a physical register of Kronnix Linux on the back label of my 2013 iBox case.
entry.content: Look at the sticker. It came factory-installed with a completely forgotten, now lost-media Linux distro called "Linux Kronnix", customized by a local budget brand named iBUX.Unfortunately, the previous owner formatted the drive, so the OS is gone. Specs are a Pentium DC G2010 and 4GB DDR3.What should I do with this e-waste machine, /g/? Is anyone here familiar with these obscure third-world Linux distros?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Japanese government to propose allowing warrantless communications interception
entry.content: >The ruling Liberal Democratic Party plans to propose having the government introduce a system that would allow, for security purposes, administrative agencies to intercept private communications without a court warrant, informed sources said Thursday. >Wiretapping is currently permitted only for criminal investigations under the wiretapping law, which took effect in 2000, and is known as “judicial interception.” >By contrast, administrative interception refers to the interception of private com
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I came here to die on a hill today. THE WISHES HAVE CONSEQUENCES. >guy on the on…
entry.content: I came here to die on a hill today. THE WISHES HAVE CONSEQUENCES. >guy on the online form, his mother wished for beauty now her son is attracted to her >Bears wish obviously >Shop owner was in the good stages of his wish, so we don't see his consequences yet. >Ian's wish leading him over to Bear's excited about the billion dollars when Nikki had the gun. The larger the wish the faster the consequences. >Theory: Sarah made a wish off screen to get into college, after she acknowledges the envelope
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
